understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character across the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile ('+'). Because the goal lies in the direction of gravity, progress typically involves positioning horizontally to access a drop/fall path that carries the character into the goal area without landing on hazards.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (or UNDO). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), reach the goal, or die by landing on spikes (u/v). CLICK targets a specific coordinate and removes a breakable/clickable block ('x') without moving the character and without consuming platform-timer moves (if present). UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move/click. Safe play requires checking the predicted landing positions after moving left/right and avoiding any landing that would place the character onto spikes.
